PROP-baseauction-inv-039.text: Data Streams price is prioritized over Data Feed; fallback only when streams price is stale AND feed configured.
PROP-baseauction-inv-039.assertion: price = streams.price if fresh; else dataFeed.price if configured AND more recent; else streams.price

locations.note: Priority logic: Data Streams price used by default, falls back to data feed only when streams is stale and feed is configured with more recent timestamp
